column1: Phew! It's much_____________(hot) than it was yesterday, isn't it?
I think you look____________(pretty) than you wear your hair up.
The price of batteries has gone up. They're a lot___________(expensive) than last time.
Angus hasn't been practicing the piano and he's got a lot_____________(bad).
His new film is much_______________(entertaining) than his last one. I loved that one!
Tell us another joke - but a_______________(short) one this time! That one took forever!
I didn't win the lottery. Maybe I'll be____________(lucky) next time.
The Russian athlete threw the discus____________(far) than all the others and won gold.
I think these biscuits are even_____________(nice) than the last ones you made!
